name: InvestRes
description: InvestRes specializes in investment management within the residential real estate sector, excelling in acquisitions, asset management, and property management. With a team of 400 professionals, they offer valuable market insights and a strong network to support real estate investors and owners.

name: Equity Real Estate LLC
description: Equity Real Estate is dedicated to transforming the real estate investment landscape by empowering agents to maximize their earnings through a 100% commission structure. Their commitment to training and support ensures that agents can effectively leverage the tools provided to enhance their success in every deal.

name: LEAD Development
description: LEAD Real Estate Developer specializes in high-end real estate development, focusing on projects for high-net-worth individuals. Since its establishment in 2010, the company has successfully delivered projects exceeding AED 10 billion and provides comprehensive consultancy services throughout the development process, from concept to execution, ensuring timely and budget-friendly delivery.

name: Hands On Real Estate
description: The company emphasizes the ease of real estate investing and invites individuals to join their community of investors, highlighting the benefits of collaborative efforts in this field.

name: BNP Paribas Real Estate
description: BNP Paribas Real Estate is a prominent international real estate provider that offers a wide range of services, including investment management, which supports investors throughout the real estate lifecycle.

name: Inland Securities Corporation
description: Inland Investments specializes in providing alternative public and private real estate securities, offering individuals access to professionally managed commercial real estate programs. With over 50 years of expertise, the company focuses on delivering value and income opportunities for investors through its collaborative efforts and deep market understanding.

name: Generali Real Estate
description: Generali Real Estate S.p.A. is a prominent real estate asset manager, overseeing over €39 billion in assets and focusing on long-term value creation for investors through diverse, cross-border investment vehicles. Their portfolio showcases a mix of historical and modern properties, with a strong commitment to sustainability and technological innovation.

name: Enterprise Real Estate
description: The company specializes in real estate solutions, offering a comprehensive platform for finding and comparing various real estate projects, which is highly relevant for real estate investment. Their services also facilitate the buying and selling of properties, providing a centralized location for all real estate listings.

name: Investis Holding SA
description: The Investis Group, established in 1994, is a leading real estate company specializing in residential properties in the Lake Geneva region and operates nationally in both the Properties and Real Estate Services segments.

name: We Invest Real Estate
description: We Invest is a franchisor in the real estate sector that offers innovative marketing and technology solutions to enhance the residential real estate experience. They provide free property valuation services and extensive support to empower franchises and agents throughout the buying, selling, and investing processes.
